top_signals.title: Nuclear-Arms Exposure in ESG Funds Rises 95%
top_signals.summary:
Bloomberg Intelligence's Shaheen Contractor joins Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ."

ESG and sustainable funds' saw 95% increase in exposure to nuclear stocks since June 2025. The increase in exposure was likely aided by EU guidance last year that left nuclear arms out of its controversial-weapons definition. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Expanding US Economy to Kids "Revolutionary": Paglia
top_signals.summary: Anna Paglia, executive vice president and chief business officer, State Street Investment Management, joins Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." Money flowing into President Donald Trump’s newly created accounts for children will initially be invested in a State Street ETF, as the US Treasury Department prepares to roll out the program.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Trump exclusive, prediction market activity soars, AI Alexander Hamilton and more in Morning Squawk
top_signals.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ottawa’s C$500M Red Chris bet tests British Columbia grid
top_signals.summary: Red Chris would need up to 145 MW from planned Northwest Transmission Line upgrades to support the Block Cave expansion.
